name: interactive-portfolio-room
description: A full-stack interactive portfolio presented as an explorable room game.

scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace @portfolio/shared && npm run dev --workspace @portfolio/backend & npm run dev --workspace @portfolio/frontend
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @portfolio/shared && npm run build --workspace @portfolio/backend && npm run build --workspace @portfolio/frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @portfolio/backend && npm run lint --workspace @portfolio/frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @portfolio/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @portfolio/backend && npm run typecheck --workspace @portfolio/frontend
scripts.db:bootstrap: npm run db:deploy --workspace @portfolio/backend && npm run db:seed --workspace @portfolio/backend
